mcq.instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

questions.q: The school ___ a project about reducing plastic waste every year.
Tom and his group ___ about water pollution in their project now.
Listen! Someone ___ the violin in the music room.
They ___ an interview with a community helper at the moment.
I ___ to someone from a different culture before.
My friend ___ part in any clean-up campaigns yet.
The class ___ the issue of food waste yesterday afternoon.
___ we ___ the map of Vietnam during geography class last Monday?
At 6:45 this morning, we ___ breakfast together.
While Minh ___ his speech, the audience was listening carefully.

rearrange.instruction: Rearrange the order of the given words to make complete sentences.

questions.q: for / as a volunteer / She / 3 years. / has worked /
answer: She has worked as a volunteer for 3 years.

questions.q: since 2020. / the War Remnants Museum / visited / We / haven't /
answer: We haven't visited the War Remnants Museum since 2020.

questions.q: statues / While / arrived. / in / bronze / were / the workshop, / the artisans / casting / the tourists /
answer: While the artisans were casting bronze statues in the workshop, the tourists arrived.

questions.q: raises / a question. / She / always / before / her hand / asking /
answer: She always raises her hand before asking a question.

questions.q: playing / My brother / at the moment. / a computer game / is /
answer: My brother is playing a computer game at the moment.

questions.q: the classroom / turned / She / yesterday. / the lights / before / off / leaving /
answer: She turned off the lights before leaving the classroom yesterday.

questions.q: taking / They / when / a tour / the city / were / it / of / to rain. / started /
answer: They were taking a tour of the city when it started to rain.

questions.q: submitted / He / already / his digital presentation. / has /
answer: He has already submitted his digital presentation.

questions.q: AI / many / future. / in / replace / think / jobs / I / will /
answer: I think AI will replace many jobs in the future.

questions.q: plastic / campaign / are / launch / They / about / waste / going / to / soon. /
answer: They are going to launch a campaign about plastic waste soon.

mcq.instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

questions.q: The villagers decided ___ the old communal house last year.
My grandmother enjoys ___ old stories about her childhood.
We plan ___ our school tradition of collecting books.
Are you interested in ___ traditional games like tug of war?
He stopped ___ a newspaper on his way home yesterday.
My parents suggest ___ the museum to learn about our history.
I promise ___ hard to preserve our cultural heritage.
She is fond of ___ bare-footed on the grass.
Please remember ___ off the lights before leaving the classroom.
Children in my village used to practise ___ out stories.

rearrange.instruction: Rearrange the order of the given words to make complete sentences.

questions.q: to preserve / We / our / traditions. / hope / cultural /
answer: We hope to preserve our cultural traditions.

questions.q: old / fancy / items? / collecting / Do / you /
answer: Do you fancy collecting old items?

questions.q: to cook / My mother / me / traditional / taught / dishes. /
answer: My mother taught me to cook traditional dishes.

questions.q: avoid / bad / habits. / We / should / forming /
answer: We should avoid forming bad habits.

questions.q: to visit / agreed / The / historic / class / the / monument. /
answer: The class agreed to visit the historic monument.

questions.q: writing / finished / She / the / about / past. / essay / has / the /
answer: She has finished writing the essay about the past.

questions.q: keen on / about / learning / history. / I / am / not /
answer: I am not keen on learning about history.

questions.q: offer. / refused / He / job / to / take / the /
answer: He refused to take the job offer.

questions.q: forward to / looking / the / festival. / We / are / attending /
answer: We are looking forward to attending the festival.

questions.q: to lock / Don't / the / forget / door. / front /
answer: Don't forget to lock the front door.

mcq.instruction: Circle the letter A, B, C or D to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

questions.q: If the local artisans ___ hard, they will finish this batch of pottery vases on time.
You ___ stuck in a traffic jam if you go to the city centre during rush hour.
If we don't preserve our cultural heritage, future generations ___ about our history.
If Mai ___ to reduce stress, she should try to maintain a well-balanced life.
The city authorities ___ solve the traffic congestion problem if they build more sky trains.
If you ___ too much time on social media, it will become a big distraction from your studies.
We will explore the limestone caves if the weather ___ good tomorrow.
If the garbage collector ___ soon, the rubbish bins will overflow.
If you want to become a skilled artisan in this pottery village, you ___ learn how to use the wheel patiently.
If he ___ fluent in English, he will easily get a job in a multinational company.

rearrange.instruction: Rearrange the order of the given words to make complete sentences.

questions.q: recycle / save / If / bottles, / plastic / will / money. / you / you
answer: If you recycle plastic bottles, you will save money.

questions.q: village / famous / will / promote / The / if / become / it. / craft / we
answer: The craft village will become famous if we promote it.

questions.q: pass / hard, / studies / exam. / she / Unless / won't / the / she
answer: Unless she studies hard, she won't pass the exam.

questions.q: should / feel / If / stressed, / rest. / take / you / you / a
answer: If you feel stressed, you should take a rest.

questions.q: book / itinerary. / you / worry about / have to / won't / the / If / package tour, / a / you /
answer: If you book a package tour, you won't have to worry about the itinerary.

completion.instruction: Complete the following sentences with NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS.

questions.q: If the government doesn't act now, the city will face serious traffic congestion. -> Unless the government ___, the city will face serious traffic congestion.
answer: acts now

questions.q: Visit the village fair to find unique handicrafts made by local artisans. -> If you visit the village fair, ___ unique handicrafts made by local artisans.
answer: you can find
you will find

questions.q: Hurry up, or you will be late for school. -> If you ___, you will be late for school.
answer: don't hurry up

questions.q: Unless she practices speaking English daily, she can't improve her skill. -> If she ___ English daily, she can't improve her skill.
answer: doesn't practice speaking

questions.q: Do morning exercise regularly and you will have a healthy body. -> If you ___ regularly, you will have a healthy body.
answer: do morning exercise

mcq.instruction: Circle the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

questions.q: I wish my neighbourhood ___ quieter; the construction site nearby is too noisy.
Lan wishes she ___ how to make traditional handicrafts like her grandmother.
Do you wish you ___ in a smart city with modern facilities?
I wish the sky train ___ crowded during rush hour so I could get a seat.
The students wish they ___ more time to explore the botanical garden.
My brother wishes he ___ so stressed out about his upcoming exams.
I wish I ___ eliminate all distractions when I study at home.
We wish the local authority ___ the old communal house immediately.
Do they wish they ___ skilled artisans?
They wish they ___ to deal with traffic congestion every morning.

rearrange.instruction: Rearrange the order of the given words to make complete sentences.

questions.q: in music. / my / I / supported / wish / choice / my parents /
answer: I wish my parents supported my choice in music.

questions.q: foreigners. / she / speak / could / wishes / to communicate / fluently / English / She / with /
answer: She wishes she could speak English fluently to communicate with foreigners.

questions.q: rubbish / I / drop / in the public places. / didn't / wish / people /
answer: I wish people didn't drop rubbish in the public places.

questions.q: this summer. / to Europe / afford / He / wishes / a package tour / he / could /
answer: He wishes he could afford a package tour to Europe this summer.

questions.q: so much. / on / rely / didn't / They / their / electronic devices / wish / they /
answer: They wish they didn't rely on their electronic devices so much.

completion.instruction: Complete the following sentences with NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS.

questions.q: The air in the downtown area is very polluted. -> I wish the air in the downtown area ___ polluted.
answer: weren't
wasn't

questions.q: My sister doesn't have a well-balanced life between work and family. -> My sister wishes she ___ life between work and family.
answer: had a well-balanced

questions.q: I don't know the itinerary for our trip well. -> I wish I ___ for our trip better.
answer: knew the itinerary

questions.q: Mai can't go to the suburbs to visit her grandparents right now. -> Mai wishes she ___ to the suburbs to visit her grandparents right now.
answer: could go

questions.q: It's a shame that we don't have enough time to explore the city. -> We wish we ___ to explore the city.
answer: had enough time

mcq.instruction: Circle the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

questions.q: This is ___ film I've ever seen.
Carol sings as beautifully as Mary, but Cindy sings ___.
Your accent is ___ than mine.
Being a firefighter is ___ than being a builder.
I'll try to finish the job ___ than the due date.
I prefer this chair to the other one. It's ___.
I'd like some ___ information about your courses.
People say that Chinese is ___ to learn than English.
This student is by far ___ in my class.
John is a ___ driver than Jim and he drives ___.

rewrite.instruction: Rewrite these sentences so that the meaning is similar to the first one.

questions.q: This machine works better than that one. -> That machine works ___
answer: That machine works worse than this machine.

questions.q: No one in my class is taller than Patrick. -> Patrick is ___
answer: Patrik is the tallest in my class.

questions.q: He drives more carefully than his wife does. -> His wife drives ___
answer: His wife drives less carefully than
more carelessly than him.

questions.q: This film is more interesting than that one. -> That film is ___
answer: That film is less interesting than
more boring than this one.

questions.q: That car is the most expensive we have ever sold. -> We have never ___
answer: We have never sold a more expensive car than this.

questions.q: Hoa studies better than Nga. -> Hoa is ___
answer: Hoa is a better student than Nga.

questions.q: Lan has never seen a more exciting match than this. -> This is ___
answer: This is the most exciting match Lan has ever seen.

questions.q: No river in the world is larger than the Amazon. -> The Amazon is ___
answer: The Amazon is the largest river in the world.
The Amazon is the largest in the world.

questions.q: My mother is a more careful worker than her mother. -> My mother works ___
answer: My mother works more carefully than her mother.

questions.q: A house in the country is cheaper than a house in the city. -> A house in the city ___
answer: A house in the city is more expensive than a house in the country.

mcq.instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

questions.q: ___ it was chilly outside, we went out for some drink.
Despite ___, Mai still caught her bus to work.
The children slept deeply ___ the noisy talk.
The weather was bad, ___ we went for a picnic.
___ of her bad luck, she won the medal.
The project was delayed ___ the team lacked resources.
The flight was cancelled ___ the thick fog.
The meeting was postponed ___ the manager's absence.
___ pollution was increasing rapidly, the government introduced stricter laws.
Because of ___, he achieved great success.

rearrange.instruction: Rearrange the order of the given words to make completed sentences.

questions.q: although we / We hardly ever / the same street. / see each other / live on
answer: We hardly ever see each other although we live on the same street.

questions.q: Despite the fact that / to the nearest village. / my foot / I managed to walk / was injured,
answer: Despite the fact that my foot was injured, I managed to walk to the nearest village.

questions.q: difficult to make / Although she earns / she finds it / a good salary, / both ends meet.
answer: Although she earns a good salary, she finds it difficult to make both ends meet.

questions.q: to spend quality time / she makes it a point / working three jobs / in a day, / In spite of / with her kids.
answer: In spite of working three jobs in a day, she makes it a point to spend quality time with her kids.

questions.q: Though he has / he never asks the adults / to make informed decisions. / some problems, / for support and guidance
answer: Though he has some problems, he never asks the adults for support and guidance to make informed decisions.

questions.q: students never felt bored / Although the schools / computers or projectors, / with the lessons. / didn't have
answer: Although the schools didn't have computers or projectors, students never felt bored with the lessons.

questions.q: their traditional ways of / Though / of artisans, / the crafts village / the villagers / is facing the lack / try to keep / making silk products.
answer: Though the crafts village is facing a lack of artisans, the villagers try to keep their traditional ways of making silk products.

questions.q: Ha Long Bay / is also home / to high biodiversity / with typical ecosystems / and thousands of / fauna and / flora species.
answer: Ha Long Bay is also home to high biodiversity with typical ecosystems and thousands of fauna and flora species.

questions.q: to get a place / for their small girl / They were hopeless / because / in the kindergarten / the application form. / they couldn't get
answer: They were hopeless to get a place in the kindergarten for their small girl because they couldn't get the application form.

questions.q: Children / still eager / eat it / to make / they can / before Tet / are / although / all the year round. / chung cake
answer: Children are still eager to make Chung cake before Tet although they can eat it all the year round.

mcq.instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

questions.q: The doctor told him he ___ drink beer, but not too much.

opts: what time does the meeting end
what time did the meeting end

questions.q: He ___ me there had been an accident on Tran Phu Street.
Huong asked where ___.
David wondered ___ doing well at school.
Mai asked Trang why ___ the film the next day.

completion.instruction: Complete the following sentences with NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS.

questions.q: "I don't like this red carpet," I said. -> I said that ___ that red carpet.
answer: I didn't like

questions.q: "We can't concentrate on our lessons now." -> The students said ___ on their lessons then.
answer: they couldn't concentrate

questions.q: "Can you speak Korean during your holiday?" -> My teacher asked me ___ speak Korean during my holiday.
answer: if I could
whether I could

questions.q: "Where is my umbrella?", Linda asked. -> Linda asked ___ was.
answer: where her umbrella

questions.q: "Will you come to my wedding?", Trang said to them. -> Trang asked them ___ come to her wedding.
answer: if they would
whether they would

questions.q: "How will you get to the campsite?" Kai asked me. -> Kai wanted to know ___ get to the campsite.
answer: how I would

questions.q: "Do you want a new jacket for your birthday?", she said to her son. -> She asked her son ___ a new jacket for his birthday.
answer: if he wanted
whether he wanted

questions.q: "Why do you forget to turn on the light?", Jimmy said to Jane. -> Jimmy asked Jane ___ to turn on the light.
answer: why she forgot

questions.q: "Will you come to my house for a meal?" Lan said to Ba. -> Lan asked Ba if ___ to her house for a meal.
answer: he would come

questions.q: "Does your father work as an engineer?", my friend told me. -> My friend asked me if ___ as an engineer.
answer: my father worked

mcq.instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

questions.q: I have never heard of the singer ___ became famous overnight.
Jack bought a book ___ covered all kinds of subjects.
Have they called the scientist ___ they are going to visit tomorrow?
Tom would like to talk with you about something ___ you did at school.
I don't know much about the girl ___ parents have moved to the countryside.
Please pass me the dictionary ___ cover is blue.
I will never forget the day ___ he saved my son from the river.
Ms Lan, ___ is our English teacher, is always fashionably dressed.
They didn't want to sell the house ___ they used to live for many years.
This picture, ___ was painted by a famous Spanish artist, is worth millions of dollars.

completion.instruction: Combine these pairs of sentences using a relative pronoun. You should write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS.

questions.q: I will show you the man. I spoke to him the other day. -> I will show you the man ___ to the other day.
answer: who whom I spoke
who that I spoke
who I spoke

questions.q: I really like the car. I bought it last year. -> I really like the car ___ last year.
answer: which I bought
that I bought
I bought

questions.q: Mr. Smith took over the company. His wife died last year. -> Mr. Smith, ___ last year, took over the company.
answer: whose wife died

questions.q: The restaurant is the best in town. We usually eat there. -> The restaurant ___ eat is the best in town.
answer: where we usually

questions.q: The film is about a woman. Her son mysteriously disappears. -> The film is about ___ son mysteriously disappears.
answer: the woman whose

questions.q: The man was arrested yesterday. He escaped from prison a week ago. -> The man ___ prison a week ago was arrested yesterday.
answer: who that escaped from
who escaped from

questions.q: The bag is heavy. It contains a lot of presents. -> The ___ a lot of presents is heavy.
answer: bag which that contains
bag which contains

questions.q: My friend's father gave us the tickets. He owns a travel agency. -> My friend's father, ___ travel agency, gave us the tickets.
answer: who owns a

questions.q: The test was very complicated. Nobody could do it. -> The test ___ do was very complicated.
answer: which that nobody could
which nobody could

questions.q: Can you tell me about the time? You feel most frustrated then. -> Can you tell me the time ___ most frustrated?
answer: when you feel

mcq.instruction: Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the best answer to each of the following questions.

questions.q: We ___ a workshop on plastic waste last Friday.
At 9 p.m last night, I ___ a documentary about the environment.
I ___ making a solar oven before.
If the government ___ more on education, the country will develop faster.
We ___ a memorable experience if we join the traditional cooking class in Hoi An.
If you ___ care of your physical health, you won't be able to work effectively.
Unless he ___ his presentation skills, he won't pass the oral exam.
I wish my house ___ closer to the metro station so I could travel easily.
The artisan wishes he ___ enough money to expand his workshop.
Do you wish you ___ how to play a musical instrument like the guitar?
___ he had enough money, he refused to buy a house.
___ her lack of hard work, she was promoted.
They are looking for the man and his dog ___ have lost the way in the forest.
Red Rain was aired in Quang Tri citadel, ___ the war against the American took place for 81 days.
George is ___ person I have ever met.
Mr. Ba usually works ___ than Mr. Nam.
She asked who was coming to the party ___.
They asked what time the train ___.
___ the friendly atmosphere, all the guests felt relaxed after the party.
Because of ___, all the crops in Thanh Hoa were destroyed.

completion.instruction: Complete the following sentences with NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS.

questions.q: I don't like the boy. Sue is going out with him. -> I don't like the boy with ___ going out.
answer: whom Sue is

questions.q: The postman is very old. He works in the village. -> The postman ___ the village is very old.
answer: who
that works in

questions.q: I don't remember the lesson. My teacher explained it to us last week. -> I don't remember the lesson which my teacher ___ last week.
answer: explained to us

questions.q: "Are you going to Ho Chi Minh City next week?", Tom asked Jane. -> Tom asked Jane ___ going to Ho Chi Minh City the next week.
answer: if
whether she was

questions.q: "Have you finished your homework?", Mom asked me. -> Mom asked if I ___ homework.
answer: had finished my

questions.q: "Does your brother live in London, Nam?", Lan asked. -> Lan asked Nam if ___ in London.
answer: his brother lived

questions.q: Mai rarely eats fast food, so she looks fit and healthy. -> Because ___ fast food, she looks fit and healthy.
answer: Mai rarely eats

questions.q: They weren't allowed to get on the plane because they forgot their passports. -> Because of ___, they weren't allowed to get on the plane.
answer: forgetting their passports

questions.q: Because she was seriously ill, the teacher told her to stay indoors during break time. -> Because of ___, the teacher told her to stay indoors during break time.
answer: her serious illness

questions.q: The camera looks new, but she doesn't want to buy it. -> Although the camera looks new, ___ to buy it.
answer: she doesn't want

questions.q: Though she lives near the beach, she rarely goes swimming there. -> Despite ___ beach, she rarely goes swimming there.
answer: living near the

questions.q: In spite of the rough sea, the yacht started its cruise. -> Even though the ___, the yacht started its cruise.
answer: sea was rough

questions.q: Linda dances more gracefully than Laura. -> Laura dances ___ Linda.
answer: less gracefully than

questions.q: Hoa is the best singer in this club. -> Nobody in this club ___ Hoa.
answer: sings better than

questions.q: We have never gone to a more expensive restaurant than this. -> This is the ___ we have ever gone to.
answer: most expensive restaurant

questions.q: I started learning English 5 years ago. -> I ___ for 5 years.
answer: have learned  English
have learned learnt English

questions.q: Unless we protect the environment, we will suffer from pollution. -> If we ___ environment, we will suffer from pollution.
answer: don't protect the

questions.q: The last time we went to the cinema was two months ago. -> We ___ the cinema for two months.
answer: haven't gone to

questions.q: I don't know what I should do to deal with exam stress. -> I wish ___ I should do to deal with exam stress.
answer: I knew what

questions.q: Unless he attends a vocational school, he won't learn these practical skills. -> If he ___ vocational school, he won't learn these practical skills.
answer: doesn't attend a

rearrange.instruction: Rearrange the order of the given words to make completed sentences.

questions.q: walk to school / they were small. / They used to / when
answer: They used to walk to school when they were small.

questions.q: which the receptionist / The information / was very useful. / gave me
answer: The information which the receptionist gave me was very useful.

questions.q: He decided to take / in America. / before going to work / an English course
answer: He decided to take an English course before going to work in America.

questions.q: a traditional market. / an old building / while they were / We were visiting / going to
answer: We were visiting an old building while they were going to a traditional market.

questions.q: he likes / He's going to / because / designing and engineering. / be an architect
answer: He's going to be an architect because he likes designing and engineering.

questions.q: too much time / his son / playing games. / He wishes / did not spend
answer: He wishes his son did not spend too much time playing games.

questions.q: because they are / These products / with lacquer. / lacquer wares / decoratively covered / are called
answer: These products are called lacquer wares because they are decoratively covered with lacquer.

questions.q: a teacher will act / a facilitator / than a giver / In the near future, / of knowledge. / more like
answer: In the near future, a teacher will act more like a facilitator than a giver of knowledge.

questions.q: successfully landed / In 2014 / part of the Rosetta mission, / on a comet. / a robot named Philae,
answer: In 2014 a robot named Philae, part of the Rosetta mission, successfully landed on a comet.

questions.q: will / in / play more / the classroom. / Students / active roles
answer: Students will play more active roles in the classroom.

questions.q: Although / she / a successful woman. / a physical handicap, / has become / she has
answer: Although she has a physical handicap, she has become a successful woman.

questions.q: good at / native speakers of English. / the language / who are / because she has / Mai is so / some friends
answer: Mai is so good at the language because she has some friends who are native speakers of English.

questions.q: and / I've / a travel photographer / take pictures / always wanted / of exotic places. / to be
answer: I've always wanted to be a travel photographer and take pictures of exotic places.

questions.q: crowded towns / are expected / within two years. / The sleepy villages / to mushroom into
answer: The sleepy villages are expected to mushroom into crowded towns within two years.

questions.q: natural wonder of / going to / a famous / Vietnam. / Phong Nha Cave / He suggested / since it's
answer: He suggested going to Phong Nha Cave since it's a famous natural wonder of Vietnam.

questions.q: seen / I / never / have / such / a / beautiful / wonder. / natural
answer: I have never seen such a beautiful natural wonder.

questions.q: you / don't / If / hurry, / miss / you / the / will / last / bus.
answer: If you don't hurry, you will miss the last bus.

questions.q: ago. / started / The / metro / construction / two / on / the / years
answer: The construction on the metro started two years ago.

questions.q: playing / were / The / tug of war / it / children / began / when / to / rain.
answer: The children were playing tug of war when it began to rain.

questions.q: English / He / everyday / skills. / to / his / speaks / improve
answer: He speaks English everyday to improve his skills.
